text:
Created attachment 202100
php-composer-1.8.4.patch

* Update to 1.8.4
* Update distinfo
* Move NO_* items to appease portlint

Changelogs from 1.8.0 to 1.8.4:

https://github.com/composer/composer/releases/tag/1.8.1
https://github.com/composer/composer/releases/tag/1.8.2
https://github.com/composer/composer/releases/tag/1.8.3
https://github.com/composer/composer/releases/tag/1.8.4

Since it is just a PHP script, no poudriere testing needed. Passes portlint per the above changes.
